headline: Exxon Mobil Cleared In Climate Case What Verdict Means For Dividend Risk
summary: Texas jury clears Exxon Mobil in a landmark securities fraud case focused on climate related disclosures. The class action alleged Exxon Mobil misled investors on the impact of climate costs on certain oil and gas projects. The verdict is the first of its kind tied to climate accounting and has implications for future disclosure lawsuits. For investors tracking Exxon Mobil (NYSE:XOM), the ruling arrives with the stock at $157.92 and a value score of 4. The shares show returns of 9.2% over...
